'''Bnugor''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] who had a pet [[snuzzleguff]] called [[Snowball (snuzzleguff)|Snowball]]. The Gamorrean lost Snowball on ''[[Mynock 7 Space Station]]'' but later recovered it at the [[Farrimmer Cafe]] owned by the old [[Filvian]] [[H'nib Statermast]].<ref name="FC" />

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|11|The Farrimmer Cafe}} {{1st}}
